arts.ttl: Tottenham beat 60 clubs to make £3.5m transfer statement as new signing breaks silence
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s record signing of young striker Mason Melia should be a ‘statement’ to Irish football, according to the player’s uncle and representative Clive Clarke. It’s a record transfer fee for a player moving out fo the League of Ireland.

arts.ttl: St Patrick’s Athletic captain gives insight into ‘humble’ Tottenham-bound teenager
arts.sum: “Like I said a few times, he is going to go up another level and it’s exciting to see. “But most importantly we get to have him this season and hopefully he can go up another level this year, because he has still got a lot to learn, a lot of maturing to do.
